classification_definitions.ACTIVE: Clearly governed script allowed only within its documented DRY_RUN or validation role. ACTIVE does not approve APPLY, worker launch, runtime execution, commit, or push.
classification_definitions.HELPER: Support script intended to be called by an approved script, validator, or operator workflow. Not an independent operator entry point.
classification_definitions.BLOCKED: Must not be run until separately reviewed, repaired, or explicitly approved with exact scope, validation, and stop point.
classification_definitions.LEGACY: Historical or imported script retained as reference evidence only. Not active authority and not safe to run by default.
classification_definitions.ARCHIVE: Candidate for future reference-only handling after dependency review. No move, delete, or rename is approved by this registry.
classification_definitions.REVIEW_REQUIRED: Insufficient evidence to classify as safe. Treat as blocked from execution until reviewed.

risk_policy_interaction.policy: RISK_POLICY.md overrides this registry. If a registry entry appears to weaken RISK_POLICY.md, the stricter safety rule wins.
blocked_boundaries: automatic escalation from output into execution authority

topology_guard_interaction.policy: Launcher and lane topology checks should reject commands that target unregistered scripts or scripts classified as BLOCKED, LEGACY, ARCHIVE, or REVIEW_REQUIRED.

validator_consumption.policy: Validators may read this registry as evidence only. Validator output does not approve execution.
future_checks: Confirm every executable script under scoped orchestration paths has a registry entry.
Block DRY_RUN scripts that write files unless a separate approved repair changes the behavior or classification.
Block APPLY, git commit, git push, runtime, worker launch, browser launch, or process launch scripts unless explicit approval evidence is supplied.
Report unknown or malformed registry values as BLOCKED or REVIEW_REQUIRED.

scripts.purpose: Clean-state gate for operator launch readiness.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Allowed as a readiness check only; output is evidence, not approval.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: May be used before launcher decisions.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators may treat this as an approved readiness gate.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep read-only and validate before routing from launchers.

scripts.purpose: Preflight preview for AI_OS orchestration readiness.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: DRY_RUN preflight only.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Allowed only as preview evidence.
scripts.validator_consumption: May be checked for presence by router validators.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep as DRY_RUN-only.

scripts.purpose: Operator loop preview without APPLY.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Allowed only because it is the DRY_RUN counterpart, not the APPLY script.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must remain preview-only.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should confirm it does not execute git mutation.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep separate from APPLY loop.

scripts.purpose: Read-only operator control-loop status.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Status evidence only.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: May be referenced as a status helper.
scripts.validator_consumption: May be treated as safe status evidence if unchanged.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep read-only.

scripts.purpose: Validates terminal lane topology before launch decisions.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Guard output is evidence only and cannot approve launch.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Primary topology guard.
scripts.validator_consumption: May consume topology registry and should later consume this execution registry.
scripts.next_safe_action: Extend in a future approved task to check execution registry classifications.

scripts.purpose: Report-only execution classification validator.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Report-only guard. Output is evidence only and does not approve script execution.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: May be run as a validation guard before launcher or script execution decisions.
scripts.validator_consumption: Approved execution registry guard entry point.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep report-only and review STOP findings before any execution decision.

scripts.purpose: Runs orchestration validator chain in DRY_RUN mode.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Validator output does not approve protected action.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: May be called after topology preflight.
scripts.validator_consumption: Approved validator-chain entry point.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep DRY_RUN and read-only.

scripts.purpose: Central DRY_RUN validator-chain runner.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Read-only validation evidence only.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Can be used after registry and topology checks.
scripts.validator_consumption: Approved validator-chain runner entry point.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep report writing disabled unless separately approved.

scripts.purpose: DRY_RUN task router preview.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Router output is not execution approval.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Should only route to registered DRY_RUN helpers.
scripts.validator_consumption: Workflow registry validators may inspect helper mappings.
scripts.next_safe_action: Future validator should confirm routed helpers are registered here.

scripts.purpose: Morning brief preview helper.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Startup helpers are helpers, not authority.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Not a lane launcher.
scripts.validator_consumption: May be used as preview evidence only.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep DRY_RUN and non-writing.

scripts.purpose: Read-only morning brief state inspection.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: State inspection only.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Not a lane launcher.
scripts.validator_consumption: May be used as startup preview evidence.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep non-writing.

scripts.purpose: Validates morning brief text contract in DRY_RUN mode.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Text-contract validation only.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Not a lane launcher.
scripts.validator_consumption: May be included in startup validators.

scripts.purpose: Resolve the active AI_OS repo root for other governed scripts.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Resolver helper only.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Used by topology guard.
scripts.validator_consumption: May be loaded by validators.

scripts.purpose: Resolve workspace intent for bootstrap flows.

scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Callers must be separately classified.
scripts.validator_consumption: May be inspected as bootstrap dependency.

scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Not a topology launcher.

scripts.risk_policy_notes: Read helper only.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Not a topology launcher.
scripts.validator_consumption: May support worker registry checks.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep non-launching.

scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Can be used as status evidence only.
scripts.validator_consumption: May be read by worker validators.

scripts.purpose: Read work packet state.

scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Not a launcher.
scripts.validator_consumption: May support packet-state validators.

scripts.purpose: DRY_RUN approval evidence matching helper.

scripts.purpose: Recommend validators in DRY_RUN mode.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Recommendation is evidence, not authorization.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Not a launcher.
scripts.validator_consumption: May be consumed by validator chain.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep recommendation-only.

scripts.purpose: APPLY operator loop.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: APPLY plus git behavior requires separate explicit approval.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must not be launcher-connected by default.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should block unless approval evidence is supplied.
scripts.next_safe_action: Use DRY_RUN counterpart before any explicit APPLY request.

scripts.purpose: Submit work through git commit and push flow.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Commit and push are protected actions.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must not be launcher-connected by default.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should block direct use.
scripts.next_safe_action: Use only after explicit commit and push approval.

scripts.purpose: Open pull request URL with a template.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Opening browser/app is a protected launcher action under workflow routing rules.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must not be topology-connected by default.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should require explicit approval evidence.
scripts.next_safe_action: Review as a future approved PR helper if needed.

scripts.purpose: Start persistent runtime supervisor.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Runtime and background execution are protected.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must not be topology-connected by default.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should block unless runtime launch approval exists.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep blocked until runtime execution task is explicitly approved.

scripts.purpose: Advance runtime packet state.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Runtime mutation requires explicit scope and validation.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must not be launcher-connected by default.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should block unapproved packet advancement.
scripts.next_safe_action: Use DRY_RUN packet checks first.

scripts.purpose: Create a work packet.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: File creation is APPLY and requires approval.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Not a launcher.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should require approval evidence for packet creation.
scripts.next_safe_action: Create packets only through approved APPLY workflow.

scripts.purpose: Move or update packet state.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Packet state mutation requires explicit approval.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Not a launcher.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should block unapproved state movement.
scripts.next_safe_action: Preview packet state before approved mutation.

scripts.purpose: Add item to command queue despite DRY_RUN filename.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: DRY_RUN scripts that write files are invalid until repaired or reclassified through approved work.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must not be routed as DRY_RUN helper.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should flag DRY_RUN write behavior.
scripts.next_safe_action: Repair naming or behavior in a separate approved task.

scripts.purpose: Update runtime memory despite DRY_RUN filename.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Runtime mutation and DRY_RUN write behavior are blocked.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must not be routed as DRY_RUN helper.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should flag DRY_RUN write behavior.
scripts.next_safe_action: Repair naming or behavior in a separate approved task.

scripts.purpose: Create worker script and update registry despite DRY_RUN filename.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Worker creation is protected and must not hide under DRY_RUN naming.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must not be routed as DRY_RUN helper.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should flag DRY_RUN write behavior.
scripts.next_safe_action: Repair naming or behavior in a separate approved task.

scripts.purpose: Morning workflow startup script.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Startup helpers must not silently mutate runtime state or write from DRY_RUN flow.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must not be auto-launched.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should review before any startup connection.
scripts.next_safe_action: Use DRY_RUN startup preview helpers.

scripts.purpose: Controlled APPLY lane with commit and push prompts.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: APPLY, commit, and push are protected actions.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must not be launcher-connected by default.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should block direct execution.
scripts.next_safe_action: Use only through a future approved controlled APPLY workflow.

scripts.purpose: Launch multiple Codex workers.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Worker launch requires explicit lane, branch, task, output, and stop condition.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must be blocked unless topology and execution registry permit it.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should reject by default.
scripts.next_safe_action: Use manual worker assignment unless separately approved.

scripts.purpose: Launch parallel DRY_RUN worker crew.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Parallel worker launch is protected even when DRY_RUN scoped.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must be blocked unless topology and execution registry permit it.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should reject by default.
scripts.next_safe_action: Use manual scoped Codex prompt unless separately approved.

scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must not be topology-connected.
